sql_array: CREATE TABLE mime_messages (id INT PRIMARY KEY, message TEXT, flag INT);

INSERT INTO mime_messages VALUES (1, 'Form: Somebody Mime-Version: 1.0 Content-Type: "multipart/mixed"; boundary="--the boundary" To: self@localhost This is a multipart MIME message ----the boundary Content-Type: image/gif; filename="the_big_picture.gif" GIF........ ----the boundary Content-Type: message/rfc822 From: Ford@Perfect To: vogon Mime-Version: 1.0 Content-Type: multipart/alternate; boundary="--sub-boundary" This is some Message ----sub-boundary Content-Type: text/plain Hi ----sub-boundary Content-Type: text/html

Hi

----sub-boundary-- Some garbage ----the boundary Content-Type: text/plain Some additional text ----the boundary-- Some additional garbage', 1);
SELECT bif:md5(mime_tree(message, 1)::text) AS mime_hash FROM mime_messages WHERE flag IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE parsed_mime (id INT PRIMARY KEY, mime_structure JSON, mime_hash TEXT);
INSERT INTO parsed_mime (id, mime_structure, mime_hash) SELECT 1, mime_tree(message, 1), bif:md5(mime_tree(message, 1)::text) FROM mime_messages WHERE flag = 1;
SELECT id, mime_structure->'Content-Type' AS content_type FROM parsed_mime WHERE mime_hash IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, bif:md5(subseq(mime_structure, 0, 20)::text) AS sub_hash FROM parsed_mime WHERE content_type IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE mime_parts (part_id INT PRIMARY KEY, content_type TEXT, part_json JSON);
INSERT INTO mime_parts (part_id, content_type, part_json) SELECT 1, mime_structure->'Content-Type', mime_structure FROM parsed_mime WHERE mime_structure IS NOT NULL;
SELECT MAX(length(content_type)) FROM mime_parts HAVING MAX(length(content_type)) > 10;
SELECT bif:md5(part_json::text) FROM mime_parts WHERE content_type LIKE '%text/%' AND part_json IS NOT NULL;
